recommendations: heredoc_for_file_modification is NEW and actionable: file append operations should use Edit tool with new_string containing the appended content; shell heredoc bypasses the tool audit trail and is the same class of anti-pattern as rg-via-Bash; worth proposing a hook if the mistake-patterns append workflow recurs

shell_tool_preference_violations and re_edit_thrash remain structurally unchanged across all 16 measured cycles with zero internalization from repeated flagging; new text recommendations are not expected to help — only structural interventions (PreToolUse hook blocking Bash grep when Grep tool is available, or a session-start reminder injected by hook) are likely to produce change
